name: Oil-Dri Corp of America
business: Oil-Dri develops, manufactures, and markets sorbent products primarily from clay minerals, including calcium bentonite, attapulgite, and diatomaceous shale. The company serves two customer groups: the Retail and Wholesale Products Group (mass merchandisers, pet stores, online retailers, etc.) and the Business to Business Products Group (edible oil processors, renewable diesel refiners, animal feed manufacturers, etc.).
sellsTo: distributors of industrial cleanup and automotive products
processors and refiners of edible oils
petroleum-based oils and biodiesel fuel refiners
manufacturers of animal feed and agricultural chemicals
distributors of animal health and nutrition products

exposures.sentence: Net sales of fluids purification products increased $17.6 million or 19% in fiscal year 2025 compared with fiscal year 2024, driven primarily by the increase in demand for our products used in renewable diesel filtration.

Net sales of our agricultural and horticultural chemical carrier products increased $10.8 million, or 32%, for fiscal year 2025 compared to fiscal year 2024 mainly as a result of stronger demand, primarily as key customers resumed purchasing after working through inventory surpluses.
Domestic cat litter net sales, excluding co-packaged cat litter, were $225.9 million for fiscal year 2025, an increase of $13.1 million, or 6%, when compared to fiscal year 2024.
We surface mine our clay on leased or owned land near our manufacturing facilities in Mississippi, Georgia, Illinois and California.
